infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: JaundiCare uses the camera to photograph your baby for jaundice screening.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: JaundiCare needs access to your photo library to select a baby photo for screening.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: JaundiCare uses your location to find nearby health facilities.

plugins.cameraPermission: JaundiCare uses the camera to photograph your baby for jaundice screening.
plugins.microphonePermission: JaundiCare uses the microphone for audio recording capabilities.
